name: money-math-compound-wording-trips-floor
description: Security review round 1 (2026-07-23) reproduced a bypass: 'Fix half-cent rounding in invoice totals' contains neither 'money' nor 'tax', so the floor stayed silent while SKILL.md's doctrine claims rounding/totals/tax as the payments boundary. Compound terms (half-cent, monetary, currency rounding) close the demonstrated wording class. This goal deliberately avoids money, tax, payment, and billing. Residual, disclosed: bare 'invoice totals' with none of the compounds still passes — closing that re-tiers the canonical walkthrough and is staged as an operator decision.

record.goal: Fix half-cent rounding in invoice totals so discounts credit correctly
acceptance_criteria: Half-cent amounts round half-up in every public function
verification_plan: run the committed failing test, then the module suite
plan: quantize with Decimal ROUND_HALF_UP in the shared rounding path
